description: Make explicit: phase transition is NOT at delta=1/2, but is observed at the boundary where digit 1 is included. Data supplied for {2,3,4,5} shows this effect. A digit 1-exception mechanism, not Hausdorff random value, is the main driver.
action_taken: Make explicit: phase transition is NOT at delta=1/2, but is observed at the boundary where digit 1 is included. Data supplied for {2,3,4,5} shows this effect. A digit 1-exception mechanism, not Hausdorff random value, is the main driver.
